goals.title: Live HQ and Performance status UX
goals.objective: Replace hardcoded HQ/header/performance status strings with live hq_status, AI budget, and needs_performance_log values from authoritative backend status APIs. The AppHeader, HQ home topbar, and Performance page/recorder must display current counts/status and preserve documented UX.
goals.evidence: Implemented live HQ and Performance status UX: added API-backed HqStatusBadge for AppHeader, HQ home, and Performance page; removed static Status Focus / 성과 미기록 1건 production copy; status badge validates /api/hq/status data including needs_performance_log and ai_budget; PerformanceRecorder refreshes all mounted badges immediately after successful performance-log save and isolates weekly summary refresh failure; aligned performance spec/docs around content_package selector plus five metric fields. Verification passed focused Biome, focused tests, full npm test, typecheck, Prisma validate, prod audit, architect CLEAR review 85-G001ArchitectClear, and QA passed 86-G001QaClear with artifact artifacts/g001-live-status-test-report.json.

goals.title: Editor autosave recovery
goals.objective: Implement session-expiry/transient-failure draft autosave preservation for content package editing. Failed autosave content must be saved locally, restored after reload/relogin, resendable, and cleared only after successful persistence.
goals.evidence: Implemented G002 editor autosave recovery: failed PATCH autosaves now write a package+draft scoped local recovery record before 401 redirect or transient-failure return; reload/relogin restores valid differing local recovery, leaves it resendable through the existing autosave effect, clears only after successful PATCH or same-body persisted evidence, updates the saved draft baseline after PATCH success, and blocks generate/search/apply-fixes/restore-original draft replacement while recovery is pending. Verification passed focused Biome, focused P3 tests, typecheck, full npm test, cleanup CLEAR job 90-G002CleanupRerun, architect CLEAR job 93-G002ArchitectFinal, and QA passed job 94-G002QaFinal with artifacts/g002-autosave-recovery-test-report.json and artifacts/g002-quality-gate.json.

goals.title: Compliance and HQ AI governance integration
goals.objective: Add adapter-backed compliance semantic review while preserving rule-engine authority, connect active policy_rules into compliance governance, use runtime AI adapter for HQ daily briefing generation, and record real AI adapter/model identity in cost logs.
goals.evidence: Implemented G003 compliance and HQ AI governance integration: AIAdapter now exposes metadata, policy-aware compliance input, provider-backed daily briefing generation, and provider cost logging with provider:model identity, required usage metering, estimated known-model cost, and test-only logging disable. Compliance loads active policy_rules, applies active descriptions/context while keeping mandatory baseline rules fail-active, runs adapter-backed semantic review additively, and fails closed on semantic review unavailability. HQ daily briefing now uses createRuntimeAIAdapter().generateDailyBriefing with company profile plus recent opportunity memo context. Verification passed focused Biome, focused G003 tests, typecheck, full npm test, Prisma validate, cleanup CLEAR jobs 103/104, architect CLEAR job 105, and executor QA passed job 106 with artifacts/g003-governance-test-report.json and artifacts/g003-quality-gate.json.

goals.title: Product import and manual product completion
goals.objective: Complete product URL import/manual fallback semantics by safely enriching or explicitly bounded parsing and adding missing manual fields for product_url, image_url, and source while preserving SSRF protections.
goals.evidence: Implemented G004 product import/manual product completion: manual create/edit now carries product_url, image_url, and source; optional blanks are trimmed/omitted with manual defaults; product_url/image_url protocols are restricted; deterministic Naver import is bounded and URL-metadata-only; import UI no longer claims crawling; validateProductImportUrl remains the mandatory SSRF gate with HTTPS Naver host allowlist, DNS all-address lookup, hardened IPv4/IPv6 private/reserved/special-use blocking, and no scraping. Verification passed final focused product/P4 tests, Biome check, typecheck, full npm test, Prisma validate, cleanup CLEAR job 121-G004CleanupUltimate, architect CLEAR job 122-G004ArchitectUltimate, and QA passed job 123-G004QaUltimate with artifacts/g004-product-completion-test-report.json and artifacts/g004-quality-gate.json.
